data.content:
Implementation complete: Added explicit size constraints (120px default, 100-150px range) to the State column in beat-column-defs-extra.tsx. This prevents the State column from absorbing excess horizontal space and ensures available width is distributed evenly across all visible columns on the Queues/Active screen.

Changes:
- Added size: 120, minSize: 100, maxSize: 150 to stateColumn definition
- Adjusted meta.minWidthPx from 128 to 100 for better flex distribution
- All tests pass (2293 tests)
- Linting and type checking pass

Feature branch: feat/foolery-2794
Commit: 7734df82dde7
